commands.review_summary:
Adds a write-capable GitHub workflow to refresh Hindi and Russian native locale artifacts and exports Control UI translation helpers for `scripts/native-app-i18n.ts`.

PR surface: Config +96, Other +126. Total +222 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: move an unchanged scanned Swift or Kotlin string so only the recorded line changes; `syncNativeI18n` rewrites `native-source.json`, but the locale artifacts remain unchanged and the workflow skip check ignores the changed source inventory.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] This maintainer draft is stacked and has a concrete workflow guard bug; the next action is author or maintainer repair with the base inventory PR rather than cleanup closure.

target.title: feat(i18n): refresh native locale artifacts
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

Native app locale work needs the same provider-backed translation process as Control UI instead of a separate manual translation path.

## Why This Change Was Made

Reuse the existing translation client, model/provider environment, glossary prompt, batching, retries, and authenticated CI commit/rebase loop for native app source inventories. The workflow refreshes deterministic Hindi and Russian native locale artifacts under apps/.i18n/native.

## User Impact

No additional runtime surface is changed by this PR. It establishes the automation that keeps Android and Apple locale artifacts current as native source strings evolve.

## Evidence

- `pnpm check:workflows`
- `pnpm test:serial test/scripts/native-app-i18n.test.ts test/scripts/control-ui-i18n.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check ...`
- `git diff --check`

AI-assisted implementation. This PR is stacked on #97110.
target.author: vincentkoc
